title: fix: catgpt bot — durable selfie URL, nanobanana-2-lite, catch-up + CLI ask
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Fixes catgpt image 400s: selfie reference URL on media.pollinations.ai expired (R2 30-day lifecycle, second occurrence after #10826) — now uses durable GitHub raw URL
- Switches comic model to nanobanana-2-lite
- On startup, answers up to 5 recent unanswered messages in the channel (😾 error-fallback replies don't count as answered)
- Adds one-shot CLI trigger: `tsx bot.ts ask "question" [avatarUrl]`

Already deployed live on enter-services EC2 and verified end-to-end.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: CatGPT remembers the thread
gist.blurb: The cat got a durable selfie, a fresh comic engine, and a small pile of messages it had been meaning to answer. Software cats, like regular cats, operate on their own schedule.
gist.summary: CatGPT now uses a durable GitHub-hosted selfie reference instead of an expiring media URL, generates comics with nanobanana-2-lite, catches up on up to five unanswered channel messages at startup, and supports one-shot questions through `tsx bot.ts ask "question" [avatarUrl]`.
gist.impact: CatGPT image requests no longer fail when its old selfie URL expires, while channel conversations can recover recent missed replies and developers can invoke a single prompt directly from the CLI.
gist.visual_concept: Depict CatGPT as a cozy pixel-art cat portrait or comic-panel companion beside Polly, with a durable framed selfie hanging safely above a retro terminal. Polly wears a tiny librarian scarf and helps the cat sort five unanswered message envelopes into a glowing nanobanana-2-lite comic machine, with code-plants and flowers making the catch-up feel warm rather than frantic.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene in a warm garden hackerspace: Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink cheek blush, light blue wings, and a tiny librarian scarf, helps a friendly pixel cat beside a retro terminal sort five little unanswered message envelopes into a glowing comic printer labeled "NANO LITE"; a durable framed cat selfie hangs safely on the wall, surrounded by code-plants and flowers. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background, chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, nostalgic but beautiful.
